# [Phase 3] Implement Shape A: MCP Notifications Path

**Origin Session ID:** `27016011-8ae9-48bb-af87-9479dd5b0fd0`

## Intent
Implement Shape A (MCP server-push notifications) for the Phase 3 autonomous wake substrate, per **ADR 0002**.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Implement the MCP notifications schema, including `wake/sent_to_me`, `wake/task_state_changed`, and `wake/permission_granted`.
- [ ] Implement capability negotiation.
- [ ] Implement dropped-connection semantics (client-driven watermark resync via `logId`).
- [ ] Build against the contract defined in `learn/agentos/decisions/0002-phase3-wake-substrate-standards-alignment.md` §6.1.
